purpose: Immediate discovery run for concrete UI templates/components similar to 21st.dev and other modern UI catalogs.
rules: Prefer concrete components, blocks, and templates over generic prompts.
Copy code only when license is verified as compatible.
Use metadata-only for paid, gated, unclear, or incompatible sources.
Keep old registry items and append new discoveries.

items.name: 21st.dev Component and Template Catalog
items.skill_usage: Use as a daily discovery source for exact community components/templates. Store each matched item with its own license and source URL.

items.name: shadcn/ui dashboard-01 block
items.skill_usage: Use as the default concrete dashboard shell reference for SaaS/admin/analytics dashboards.

items.name: shadcn/ui sidebar-07 block
items.skill_usage: Use when generating dashboard sidebars, workspace switchers, and responsive app navigation.

items.name: Magic UI free animated components
items.skill_usage: Use for animated website effects and premium-looking landing page sections. Keep Pro templates metadata-only unless license permits reuse.

items.name: Aceternity Productized Agency Template
items.skill_usage: Use as design/reference metadata for agency and service business website generation.

items.name: Aceternity Simplistic SaaS Template
items.skill_usage: Use as a high-quality reference for AI/SaaS landing pages with bento grids and microinteractions.

items.name: Aceternity Nodus Agent Template
items.skill_usage: Use as design/reference metadata for AI agent, chatbot, and automation SaaS websites.

items.name: Preline UI components, blocks and templates
items.framework: HTML, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Vue, Next.js, Laravel and more
items.skill_usage: Use for non-React HTML/Tailwind output and cross-framework UI blocks. Verify each item license before copying.

items.name: Tremor dashboard and analytics templates
items.skill_usage: Use for monitoring, analytics, KPI, queue, and infra dashboards that need strong chart/table patterns.

items.name: Coss UI / Origin UI component particles
items.skill_usage: Use as a component taxonomy/reference for admin and SaaS app primitives. Verify license before copying implementation code.
